news.t: Schwab Ramps Up Competition With 4 New ETF Fee Cuts
Schwab Asset Management Reduces Fees on Four Equity Index ETFs
Schwab Asset Management Announces ETF Share Splits
Small-cap and midcap ETFs charge higher as investors continue to rotate

holdings.infoBox: SCHM is an equity ETF with a total of 498 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sandisk stock at 5.60%, Coherent at 1.40%, Bloom Energy at 1.27%, Lumentum Holdings at 1.23%, and Ciena at 1.17%.

overview.description: The Schwab U.S. Mid-Cap ETF (SCHM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in mid cap equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of mid-cap stocks in the Dow Jones US Total Stock Market Index. SCHM was launched on Jan 13, 2011 and is issued by Charles Schwab.
infoTable: Dow Jones US Total Stock Market Mid-Cap

data.title: Schwab Ramps Up Competition With 4 New ETF Fee Cuts
data.text: On Thursday, June 11, Schwab Asset Management announced that it cut down the expense ratios on four of its existing indexed ETFs. Each of these funds is a longstanding strategy in Schwab's collection,...

data.title: Small-cap and midcap ETFs charge higher as investors continue to rotate
